schema_version: v0 — skill-charter shape; migrates into the intention envelope when MAP.md Q6 lands
what: Birth a node — a new track or an aside. Unpack it into WHAT (the intent) and HOW (the approach), and trace it up to the Telos.
why: The work loop's entry. Nothing enters the system unarticulated (Law 5: intent and implementation share an address). The trace-to-Telos step enforces the charter's own rule — 'what can't trace up doesn't belong' — at the cheapest possible moment, before any cost is spent (Law 1: the resolver is spent on the novel).
state: v0 — first cast 2026-07-15. Behavior is a resolver-occupied question nexus; the role-replacement staircase applies (this occupancy is measured out, never declared out).
produces: a node in intention fill-state — WHAT/HOW unpacked, traced, not yet cast. Casting (type it, bind its gates) happens later, inside /sorted.

nexus.note: SKILL.md carries the live question set; this is the charter-face record of it.
nexus.routes_back: cannot trace to Telos → it doesn't belong; say so and stop, don't file it

traces_to: Law 5 (intent and implementation share an address)
owner: the skills charter gates writes to this file; Akien ratifies changes (signature gate)
proof: a skill node reaches done only when cairnmap recompiles green (the skill class's derivation gate). IOU until cairnmap is built — tracked in proofs/.
provenance: converged in the founding design conversation (MAP.md 'Workflow + starting skills', 2026-07-15); first exemplar of the skill-charter mold.
